stem: Several common application-layer protocols are listed in the table below. For each protocol, tick every box that describes a typical use of that protocol. Some protocols may have more than one tick.
model_answer: HTTP and HTTPS both transfer web pages, but only HTTPS encrypts the traffic. SMTP sends email between mail servers; IMAP retrieves email from a server while leaving the original on the server. FTP transfers files between client and server.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Tick the box(es) that describe each protocol. Each row may need more than one tick.
